targets.queryText: SELECT holdings_count AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT holdings_count AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT positions_profitable AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT positions_profitable AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT positions_losing AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT positions_losing AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT ROUND(CAST(positions_profitable AS REAL) / holdings_count * 100, 1) AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT ROUND(CAST(positions_profitable AS REAL) / holdings_count * 100, 1) AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT symbol, ROUND(unrealized_pct, 2) AS pnl_pct, ROUND(unrealized_pnl, 0) AS pnl_usd, ROUND(weight_pct, 1) AS weight, UPPER(risk_quality_category) AS risk FROM daily_holdings WHERE as_of_date_local = (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_holdings) AND ABS(unrealized_pct) > 5 ORDER BY ABS(unrealized_pct) DESC;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT symbol, ROUND(unrealized_pct, 2) AS pnl_pct, ROUND(unrealized_pnl, 0) AS pnl_usd, ROUND(weight_pct, 1) AS weight, UPPER(risk_quality_category) AS risk FROM daily_holdings WHERE as_of_date_local = (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_holdings) AND ABS(unrealized_pct) > 5 ORDER BY ABS(unrealized_pct) DESC;

targets.queryText: SELECT symbol, ROUND(unrealized_pct, 2) AS pnl_pct, ROUND(unrealized_pnl, 0) AS pnl_usd, ROUND(cost_basis, 0) AS cost, ROUND(market_value, 0) AS mv, ROUND(weight_pct, 1) AS weight FROM daily_holdings WHERE as_of_date_local = (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_holdings) ORDER BY unrealized_pct ASC;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT symbol, ROUND(unrealized_pct, 2) AS pnl_pct, ROUND(unrealized_pnl, 0) AS pnl_usd, ROUND(cost_basis, 0) AS cost, ROUND(market_value, 0) AS mv, ROUND(weight_pct, 1) AS weight FROM daily_holdings WHERE as_of_date_local = (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_holdings) ORDER BY unrealized_pct ASC;
